offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We provide aging report extraction instead of manual tracking and reporting in spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent and delayed accounts receivable aging reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try Weekly report generation and Customizable formats on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
